steps.expected: App loads in mock mode with camera view and bounding boxes
steps.observed: App loaded successfully with Mock Detection Mode indicator

steps.expected: Policy is selected and detections render with appropriate coverage colors
steps.observed: Renter's Insurance selected, localStorage updated with insurescope_policyType='renters'

steps.action: Click on Dashboard tab to view detected items
steps.expected: Dashboard shows list of detected items with coverage status
steps.observed: Dashboard displayed 3 items: laptop (Covered $1,200), car (Not Covered $15,000), bicycle (Conditional $500)

steps.action: Click on laptop item in dashboard to open detail modal
steps.expected: Detail modal opens showing laptop item information
steps.observed: Modal opened showing complete laptop details: Item: Laptop, Value: $1,200, Status: Covered, Policy: Renter's Insurance, Coverage Details: Personal electronics are covered under renter's personal property coverage, Common Claim Scenarios listed, Coverage Enhancements suggested

steps.action: Close modal and return to Camera tab
steps.expected: Modal closes, camera view visible with bounding boxes
steps.observed: Modal closed successfully, returned to camera view

steps.action: Attempt to open laptop detail modal from camera overlay by clicking on canvas bounding boxes
steps.expected: Detail modal opens showing the same laptop information
steps.observed: Multiple click attempts at various canvas coordinates did not trigger the detail modal. Canvas at (378, 47) with size 523x120. Tried: JavaScript canvas clicks, mouse commands at positions (483,77), (587,77), (640,107), (535,137), (400,80), (500,80), (600,80)

findings.expected: Detail modal shows consistent information regardless of entry point (camera overlay vs dashboard)
findings.observed: Dashboard entry point works correctly - modal shows complete laptop details including item name ($1,200 value), coverage status (Covered), policy (Renter's Insurance), coverage details, common claim scenarios, and coverage enhancements. Camera overlay entry point click functionality did not respond to multiple interaction attempts.
findings.result: PARTIAL PASS - Dashboard-to-modal flow works perfectly and displays complete consistent information. Camera overlay bounding box click functionality did not trigger the modal despite multiple attempts using different interaction methods (JavaScript canvas events, mouse commands). This appears to be a UI interaction issue with the canvas overlay click handler.

frictions.description: Canvas overlay bounding box click handler not responding to mouse/touch events in mock detection mode. Attempted multiple interaction methods (JavaScript canvas dispatch, mouse move/click commands) at various positions where bounding boxes are rendered, but detail modal did not open from camera view.

dashboardModalContent.coverageDetails: Personal electronics are covered under renter's personal property coverage
dashboardModalContent.coverageEnhancements: Consider replacement cost coverage for full value reimbursement

notes: The dashboard entry point provides complete and consistent modal information. The canvas overlay click handler may need investigation for proper event handling in mock detection mode. All screenshots and evidence saved to evidence/dashboard/cross-007/
